title: TRANS CLINIC - 211info
text: OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE TRANS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care, safer sex supplies, HIV/STD testing, and hormone therapy. Hormone Replacement Therapy provided on an informed consent model. 16144 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as transgender, gender queer, queer, and questioning Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-5pm. Friday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm. The 2nd Tuesday of every month is closed until 10am. Email (503) 535-3860 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-3860 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Sliding scale, no one is refused service for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-5pm. Friday 8:30am-noon and 12:45pm-4:30pm. The 2nd Tuesday of every month is closed until 11am. Services: General Medical Care * Transgender Individuals HIV Testing * Transgender Individuals Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Transgender Individuals Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUTSIDE IN EAST BURNSIDE
